chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1595 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For orders on stay application 5. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sabir Hussain, Advocate for Petitioner ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner under instructions withdraws instant Petition, which is dismissed as withdrawn along with applications listed at serial No.3 & 4. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
